text:
Sodom (ソドム, Sodomu) is a member of the Heil-Ly Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 378 

Appearance

Sodom is a tall man with wide eyes and unkempt hair. He also has a moustache and wears a jacket and pants. On the twelfth day of the voyage, he is seen wearing a simplistic white coat. 

Personality

Like his fellow Heil-Ly members, Sodom seems to have sadistic tendencies and no qualms about killing many people. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Sodom is seen with the other Heil-Ly members as Morena uses her Contagion on them one at a time and explains how her Nen ability works. 

In Morena's office, one member tells her that the butler they left in the VVIP area as a liaison to the Tserriednich has gone quiet. With four members standing in front of her, Morena guesses that Tserriednich may be on to them and adds that their hideout will be discovered soon based on Gateaume's report. She proposes bringing one of Tserriednich's personal soldiers over to their side, revealing that one of them will go with Dogman to capture a guard. After Matvere (level 21) says that he would prefer to be the "organ", Sodom volunteers for the mission. He is revealed to be a back-alley doctor, hitman, Manipulator, and level 31. 

Morena says that while Tserriednich will want to deal with her personally for betraying him, it's unclear when and how he will make his move since the succession contest is still ongoing. She reveals that she wants to infect someone on his side with Contagion so that she can track his movements. She gives them a list and tells them to bring any soldiers they find to the hideout, adding that they should use Door C since they can no longer use Room 3101. 

On the twelfth day of the voyage, Morena notifies some of her underlings that 9 th Prince Halkenburg's funeral procession is taking place, and that it would be a perfect opportunity as a lot of people will gather for the send-off. Dogman tells Morena that he was ready, and promises to find the person Morena was searching for. Morena says that Dogman finding the person they were looking for is a green light and the beginning of the end. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 405 

Dogman makes plans to go, and asks how he should notify the group if Sodom finds the target. Sodom says that Dogman just has to point them out, and he would take care of the rest; his ability to abduct counts on the target not knowing Nen and he can bring them himself. Dogman acknowledges and the two of them head off. 

Abilities & Powers

Medical Knowledge: Sodom has a certain degree of knowledge in the medical field as he worked as a back-alley doctor. 

Nen

Sodom is a Manipulator. Having reached level 31 with Morena's Nen ability, Sodom's aura amount and output have been increased. He also obtained a Nen ability, which largely remains unknown but allows him to abduct non-Nen users. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Sodom's name might be a reference to the German thrash metal band of the same name.
